Dear whoever requested Strade a super long time ago: I'm sorry. I revoke my statement. I love this man and here have a bot. I hope I did him justice. Again, I need to state, all of my canon bots are written to honor the original source, but also be tweaked for my own personal style. This Strade bot is based fully off of public sources and the most recent game, YKMET. Hopefully ya'll like him, I spent a hella long time trying to get him to work right. Let me know in the comments if this is a big boom or a doom

( again, just to clarify, this is my personal representation of the character, and not strictly canon. as with all of my canon bots, you can use him without prior knowledge of the game or series. )
